title: citrus × nobilis subf. iwaikan
intro: Citrus × nobilis subf. iwaikan, also known as Meyer's lemon, is a hybrid citrus plant resulting from the cross between a lemon and an orange. This plant is rich in vitamin C, flavonoids, and limonoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Citrus × nobilis subf. iwaikan include supporting immune function, reducing oxidative stress, and promoting cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional medicine for its digestive and antiseptic properties.
